'''saromo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sky|sky]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sky|sky]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:særimith|særimith]] || [[word:særimij|særimij]] || [[word:særimish|særimish]] || [[word:særimi|særimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sarurumuth|sarurumuth]] || [[word:sarurumuj|sarurumuj]] || [[word:sarurumush|sarurumush]] || [[word:sarurumu|sarurumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sarumuth|sarumuth]] || [[word:sarumuj|sarumuj]] || [[word:sarumush|sarumush]] || [[word:sarumu|sarumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarufmuth|sarufmuth]] || [[word:sarufmuj|sarufmuj]] || [[word:sarufmush|sarufmush]] || [[word:sarufmuf|sarufmuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:særemeth|særemeth]] || [[word:særemej|særemej]] || [[word:særemesh|særemesh]] || [[word:særeme|særeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:saroromoth|saroromoth]] || [[word:saroromoj|saroromoj]] || [[word:saroromosh|saroromosh]] || [[word:saroromo|saroromo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:saromoth|saromoth]] || [[word:saromoj|saromoj]] || [[word:saromosh|saromosh]] || [[word:saromo|saromo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarofmoth|sarofmoth]] || [[word:sarofmoj|sarofmoj]] || [[word:sarofmosh|sarofmosh]] || [[word:sarofmof|sarofmof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:sarïfmïf|sarïfmïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:sarïfrïfmïf|sarïfrïfmïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:særæmæth|særæmæth]] || [[word:særæmæj|særæmæj]] || [[word:særæmæsh|særæmæsh]] || [[word:særæmæ|særæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sararamath|sararamath]] || [[word:sararamaj|sararamaj]] || [[word:sararamash|sararamash]] || [[word:sararama|sararama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:saramath|saramath]] || [[word:saramaj|saramaj]] || [[word:saramash|saramash]] || [[word:sarama|sarama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sarafmath|sarafmath]] || [[word:sarafmaj|sarafmaj]] || [[word:sarafmash|sarafmash]] || [[word:sarafmaf|sarafmaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saramatha|saramatha]] || [[word:saramaja|saramaja]] || [[word:saramasha|saramasha]] || [[word:saramaka|saramaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saramath|saramath]] || [[word:saramaj|saramaj]] || [[word:saramash|saramash]] || [[word:sarama|sarama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saramathal|saramathal]] || [[word:saramajal|saramajal]] || [[word:saramashal|saramashal]] || [[word:saramakal|saramakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saramathatha|saramathatha]] || [[word:saramajaja|saramajaja]] || [[word:saramashasha|saramashasha]] || [[word:saramaka|saramaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saramathan|saramathan]] || [[word:saramajan|saramajan]] || [[word:saramashan|saramashan]] || [[word:saramakan|saramakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saramathaoro|saramathaoro]] || [[word:saramajaoro|saramajaoro]] || [[word:saramashaoro|saramashaoro]] || [[word:saramakaoro|saramakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
